case_title: DANIEL NGO VS. LYFT, INC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-15-2019 CONTINUED TO JUN-26-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
